patch.summary: Update custom fields for a shift assignment
patch.description:
Update custom fields for a shift assignment. The request body should contain a dictionary mapping custom field names to their values.
 - Requires: `API Tier 2`

schema.description: Dictionary mapping custom field names to their values. Field names are dynamic and depend on your company's custom field configuration.

FieldName1.description: Example custom field name. Replace with your actual custom field names.

200.description: Updated shift assignment with custom fields

patch.summary: Update custom fields for a unassigned shift
patch.description:
Update custom fields for a unassigned shift. The request body should contain a dictionary mapping custom field names to their values.
 - Requires: `API Tier 2`

schema.description: Dictionary mapping custom field names to their values. Field names are dynamic and depend on your company's custom field configuration.

FieldName1.description: Example custom field name. Replace with your actual custom field names.

200.description: Updated unassigned shift with custom fields

post.summary: Assign a worker to an unassigned shift
post.description:
Assign a worker to an unassigned shift (open shift). The shift must be an open shift and not at capacity.
 - Requires: `API Tier 2`

worker_id.description: The ID of the worker (role) to assign to the shift

assignment_id.description: The ID of the newly created shift assignment

assigned_count.description: The current number of assigned workers for this shift

target_count.description: The target number of workers for this shift

assigned_shift_ids.description: List of shift assignment IDs for this shift

Paired with the FUTURE_START type. `OFFER_ACCEPTED` Candidate has accepted the offer but has not yet started. Paired with the FUTURE_START type. `PLAN_CHANGE` Headcount status changed due to business decision. Paired with CLOSED type. `TERMINATED` Role was filled, but the employee was separated from the company. Paired with CLOSED type. `TRANSFERRED` Employee moved internally to another role. Paired with CLOSED type.
